summary: Back button now returns to previous screen (market list or home) instead of always navigating to home.

before_after_pairs.label: AC1: Back from market detail returns to market list (not home)
before_after_pairs.note: Before: back button always navigated to home, losing the market list context. After: back button navigates to market list.

before_after_pairs.label: AC2: Back from market detail returns to wallet home
before_after_pairs.note: After fix, back from market detail (when arrived from home) correctly returns to wallet home with Perps tab visible.

videos.note: Videos show the full recipe run. Screenshots are sufficient to prove the fix.
